name: Chronic treatment with tadalafil improves endothelial function in men with increased cardiovascular risk.
summary: Small randomized placebo-controlled trial testing tadalafil 20 mg every other day for 4 weeks in men with erectile dysfunction and increased cardiovascular risk, with brachial artery flow-mediated dilation and endothelial biomarkers measured at baseline, week 4, and follow-up.

access_attempts.result: PubMed abstract and metadata accessed via NCBI E-utilities.
